title: Water Activities
description: From scuba diving to water skiing, hit the water and indulge your passion, for a fantastic water activities experience.

tips.title: UK Headquarters can provide alternative requirements for water sports not listed above. You can gain a badge for every standard you meet.
This badge is for non-boating activities. If you're interested in boating, you might prefer Dragon Boating, Power Coxswain, Pulling or Nautical Skills.
